authority: CIS-EX-008 proposed protocol; not authorized for collection

scope.population: population pending methods and accessibility review

prohibited_interpretations: Absence of the declared signifier does not establish that a participant cannot perceive or discover the operation.
mapping_rule: Preserve target state and operation semantics; expose the target operation through the same executable control path while omitting the declared target-operation signifier.
interpretation_assumptions: Other host conventions may still function as signals and must be audited before freezing.
observer_class: reviewed study participants after standardized training
intended_use: test the effect of removing one declared signifier while preserving target semantics and exposed operations
failure_conditions: Target or recovery operation differs between conditions.
Measured feedback latency exceeds the preregistered equivalence bound.
The audited target signifier remains present in this condition.
